sentences.arabic: يَقْرَأُ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ الْقُرْآنَ كُلَّ مَسَاءٍ.
sentences.translationEn: Abdullah reads the Quran every evening.

sentences.arabic: يَجْلِسُ فِي غُرْفَتِهِ بَعْدَ صَلَاةِ الْعِشَاءِ.
sentences.translationEn: He sits in his room after the Isha prayer.

sentences.translation: Čita polako i razmišlja o ajetima.
sentences.translationEn: He reads slowly and ponders the verses.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ: الْقُرْآنُ يُرِيحُ قَلْبِي وَيُنِيرُ عَقْلِي.
sentences.translation: Kaže: Kur'an smiruje moje srce i prosvjetljuje moj razum.
sentences.translationEn: He says: The Quran calms my heart and enlightens my mind.
